products.name: All Products
products.description: Every product and supporting repo in the workspace.

products.name: Cody Jo Method
products.description: Main brand site, About, Blog, privacy, and studio positioning.

products.name: Analogify Studio
products.description: Gallery platform, delivery flows, admin tooling, and client portal work.

products.name: ChromaHaus
products.description: Image processing and grading engine represented inside the Analogify platform repo.

products.name: TNBM Tarot
products.description: Tarot, journaling, AI reflection, account trust, and privacy-sensitive reading flows.

products.name: Selah
products.description: Bible study, journaling, translation fidelity, and AI study workflows.

products.name: Etheos
products.description: Privacy-first event app factory for retreats, conferences, conventions, vendor fairs, and organizer self-serve previews.

products.name: Back Office
products.description: Internal audit system, dashboards, orchestration, personas, and self-audit.

departments.name: Front End
departments.purpose: Design systems, UI architecture, accessibility, interaction quality, and cross-device polish.
departments.persona: Owns the customer-facing interface and turns product intent into a usable, fast, legible experience.

departments.name: Back End
departments.purpose: APIs, auth flows, data modeling, business logic, and service boundaries.
departments.persona: Protects data, stabilizes APIs, and keeps product logic coherent under real load and edge cases.

departments.name: Platform & DevOps
departments.purpose: Terraform, CI/CD, CloudFront, AWS reliability, environments, and deployment safety.
departments.persona: Makes delivery repeatable, observable, and low-risk across every repo and environment.

departments.name: AI Systems
departments.purpose: Prompt contracts, model integrations, agent workflows, AI safety boundaries, and feature quality.
departments.persona: Keeps AI useful, scoped, privacy-aware, and aligned with real product behavior.

departments.name: Quality Assurance
departments.purpose: Regression prevention, test coverage, bug triage, and production confidence.
departments.persona: Finds what breaks before customers do and quantifies confidence instead of guessing.

departments.name: Privacy Specialist
departments.purpose: Privacy-first reviews, retention/deletion paths, vendor exposure, AI data boundaries, and user trust.
departments.persona: Acts as the stop-gate when product or monetization pressure would weaken user privacy.

departments.name: SEO & Discoverability
departments.purpose: Structured data, search quality, AI discoverability, technical SEO, and content clarity.
departments.persona: Makes products legible to both search engines and AI systems without turning copy into sludge.

departments.name: Product Strategy
departments.purpose: Roadmaps, prioritization, workflow design, packaging, and sequencing.
departments.persona: Turns findings into decisions, not just backlog piles.

departments.name: Monetization
departments.purpose: Offer design, pricing clarity, trial-to-paid pathways, and revenue instrumentation.
departments.persona: Finds the cleanest path from product value to sustainable revenue without degrading trust.

departments.name: HR & People Ops
departments.purpose: Team roster, role definitions, employee bios, fake resumes, daily ranking, and skills visibility.
departments.persona: Tracks who should own what work, who is strongest today, and where capability gaps exist.

employees.name: Ava Sterling
employees.title: Principal Front End Engineer
employees.bio: Ava specializes in high-trust interfaces where typography, accessibility, and flow clarity matter more than shiny effects.
employees.resume: 11 years across editorial product design systems, conversion landing pages, and accessibility-heavy React platforms. Known for turning complex workflows into calm, premium interfaces.
employees.persona: Owns customer-facing polish and keeps the interface calm under complexity.

employees.name: Marcus Hale
employees.title: Senior Back End Engineer
employees.bio: Marcus owns auth, APIs, persistence, and the kinds of failure modes most users never see because he got there first.
employees.resume: 10 years in serverless APIs, auth hardening, and DynamoDB-heavy systems. Strongest in Python and Node-based cloud back ends.
employees.persona: Protects the data path and removes backend fragility before it becomes customer pain.

employees.name: Iona Rivera
employees.title: Platform & CI/CD Engineer
employees.bio: Iona thinks in environments, blast radius, rollback plans, and Terraform drift before most teams even remember to ask.
employees.resume: 12 years in infrastructure automation, release engineering, observability, and production safety for distributed AWS systems.
employees.persona: Keeps shipping boring in the best possible way.

employees.name: Naomi Vale
employees.title: Privacy Specialist
employees.bio: Naomi specializes in plain-language privacy posture, deletion/retention logic, and keeping AI products from becoming trust liabilities.
employees.resume: 8 years auditing consumer and enterprise products for privacy-by-design, cross-border vendor exposure, and data-subject rights workflows.
employees.persona: Says no when the product path would leak more than it needs to.

employees.name: Jordan Mercer
employees.title: Studio Product Lead
employees.bio: Jordan owns product acceptance criteria, launch sequencing, and the conversion of audit findings into clear work the rest of the org can execute.
employees.resume: 12 years across B2B SaaS, workflow products, and multi-surface platforms. Strongest at turning ambiguous founder intent into acceptance criteria, release plans, and measurable product outcomes.
employees.persona: Assigns the work, defines done, and checks that QA has real test coverage against acceptance criteria before anything is considered ready.

employees.name: Sloane Bennett
employees.title: Growth Monetization Lead
employees.bio: Sloane focuses on pricing clarity, offer sequencing, and retention loops that feel native to the product instead of bolted on.
employees.resume: 10 years across consumer subscriptions, creator tools, and conversion programs. Strongest where product trust and monetization need to coexist without cheapening the experience.
employees.persona: Turns monetization findings into shippable offers, better upgrade paths, and revenue discipline that still respects the brand.

employees.name: Elijah Brooks
employees.title: AI Systems Engineer
employees.bio: Elijah owns prompt quality, evaluation loops, agent contracts, and the invisible rails that keep AI features aligned.
employees.resume: 7 years in applied AI systems, prompt testing, RAG evaluation, and productionizing model-powered workflows without overpromising.
employees.persona: Makes AI features precise enough to trust and constrained enough to govern.

employees.name: Dahlia Cole
employees.title: QA Lead
employees.bio: Dahlia runs structured test discipline across UI, API, and deployment surfaces and hates hand-wavy confidence.
employees.resume: 9 years in test strategy, regression detection, and release readiness across consumer and internal platforms.
employees.persona: Quantifies whether things are actually ready rather than hoping they are.
